name: Platinum Visa - Master Credit Card
url: https://www.banquemisr.com/Home/SMEs/Retail Banking/Pages/Cards/Credit Cards Pages/Platinum Visa - Master Credit Card
full_text:
Platinum Visa - Master Credit Card


--- Benefits ---

VISA Platinum Credit Card

• Internet banking
• Use your Visa Card and get a 11% discount on Gettransfer.com
• Purchases protection service; offered to Platinum Visa Cardholders to protect their purchase against theft and damage for up to 365 days as of the date of purchase.
• Extended warranty period; warranty period for all the purchases purchased with platinum visa credit card extends up to one year maximum
• Enjoy several benefits and services during travelling including medical and legal services in addition to other services all over the world
• Free SMS service after each card transaction.
• Purchasing using Contactless technology to make your shopping safe, fast and easy
• International usage is available after 2 months for credit cards following their date of issuance.
• Enjoy 6 free access to numerous airport lounges worldwide with Visa Airport Companion App. Eligibility requires making an international transaction of at least USD 5 (or equivalent in EGP) via POS or ecommerce within 90 days prior to travel. Rewards Program: Earn 3 points per each EGP spent locally and internationally. Enjoy 25,000 welcome points upon spending 2,500 EGP within 3 months from the issuing date. Earned points can be redeemed through various ways: Electronic Vouchers: Use your points to generate E-vouchers through BM online redeemable at participating merchant outlets. Instant Redemption: Instantly redeem your points at selected partner merchants without need for E-voucher issuance. Cashback: Convert your points into cash and transfer the value directly to your Banque Misr card. For more information please visit: Banquemisr - BM Rewards Club To be able to manage your points please log into BM online or visit: www.bmrewardsclub.com . Terms and conditions applied.


--- Rewards Program ---

• Earn 3 points per each EGP spent locally and internationally.
• Enjoy 25,000 welcome points upon spending 2,500 EGP within 3 months from the issuing date.
• Earned points can be redeemed through various ways: Electronic Vouchers: Use your points to generate E-vouchers through BM online redeemable at participating merchant outlets. Instant Redemption: Instantly redeem your points at selected partner merchants without need for E-voucher issuance. Cashback: Convert your points into cash and transfer the value directly to your Banque Misr card.
• Electronic Vouchers: Use your points to generate E-vouchers through BM online redeemable at participating merchant outlets.
• Instant Redemption: Instantly redeem your points at selected partner merchants without need for E-voucher issuance.
• Cashback: Convert your points into cash and transfer the value directly to your Banque Misr card.
• For more information please visit: Banquemisr - BM Rewards Club
• To be able to manage your points please log into BM online or visit: www.bmrewardsclub.com . Terms and conditions applied.


--- Usage limits ---

Limit | Details
Limit of Online Purchasing Inside Egypt | Within the card credit limits with Maximum 400,000 EGP per Month with a limit of 12 times daily
Limit of Online Purchasing Outside Egypt (In case the customer has not informed the bank of the travel) (within the monthly purchase limit outside Egypt) | 100,000 EGP Monthly with a limit of 8 times daily
Contactless purchase limit without pin inside Egypt | 600 EGP per transaction with maximum 15 consecutive transaction
Contactless purchase limit without pin outside Egypt | Equivalent to 50 USD per transaction with maximum 15 consecutive Transaction
Local purchase transactions | Within the credit limits of the card
International purchase transactions (In case the customer has informed the bank of the travel) (E-commerce - POS) | 300,000 EGP Monthly
International monthly purchase limit (in case the customer hasn’t informed the bank of the travel) | 100,000EGP monthly
Local cash withdrawals (ATM) | EGP 30000 Daily
P.O.S cash withdrawal from BM Branches | with max limit 250000 Daily
International cash withdrawals (In case the customer has informed the bank of the travel) | 3000 EGP Monthly


--- Credit Limit ---

• Enjoy credit limit starting from 25000 EGP up to less than 100000 EGP


--- Fees and charges ---

Fees and charges | Details
Issuance | EGP 500
Renewal | EGP 500
Supplementary cards issuance and renewal | EGP 300
Reissuance of replacement for lost/damaged cards | EGP250
Cash withdrawals through BM ATMs and P.O.S and Other banks’ machines within Egypt | 2% of the amount withdrawn with minimumEGP15
Inquiry about the available balance via BM ATMs | Free
Inquiry about the available balance via Other banks’ ATMs inside Egypt | EGP1 per transaction
Inquiry about the available balance via ATMs outside Egypt | EGP 3 per transaction
Interest rate | 4% monthly
Penalty for delay | EGP 75
Exceeding credit limit | EGP 75
Cash withdrawals outside Egypt | 3% of the transaction’s value + EGP 50 per transaction
Commission for transactions outside Egypt (cash withdrawals – purchases) | 3% of the transaction’s value
Disputing on any transaction through (Fax, Email or Call Centre) where it is proven that the customer is not entitled to dispute on such transaction | EGP 50
Printing certified transactions statement starting from the following month | EGP 20
Requesting clearance letter, certificate of indebtedness or to whom it may concern letter | EGP 50
Upgraded credit cards fees | 50% of the issuance fees (first three years)


--- Purchases and Cash Withdrawals Installments ---

In case the customer wishes to pay-on installment for a processed transaction, then the following procedures shall be applied:

MasterCard Platinum Credit Card

• Cash withdrawal transaction is carried out through credit card according to the card available balance
• During the performance of cash withdrawal transaction BM call center will be contacted in order to request the installment of transaction.
• Early repayment fees of 4% are applied in case the customer has paid the value of his installment.
• Cash withdrawal charges calculated on the customer’s credit card and related to the amount requested to be paid-on installment will be refunded.

Tenor (Months) | Interest Rate on Purchases and Cash Withdrawals:
3 | 2.81%
6 | 2.77%
9 | 2.76%
12 | 2.73%
18 | 2.67%
24 | 2.63%
36 | 2.56%


--- Benefits ---

• Internet banking
• promotions and discounts in the fanciest shopping centers inside and outside Egypt which are specified in Priceless Specials application for MasterCard Credit Cards
• Use your Platinum Mastercard on Careem App across the Middle East to save 20% on 3 rides every month using Promo Code "MASTERCARD”
• Protecting Platinum MasterCard purchases against theft and damage for up to 180 days as of the date of purchase (the date proved within the purchase bill).
• Order online with Carrefour with your eligible Platinum Mastercard to enjoy 20% off shopping orders once per month. enter promo code MA20 at check out.
• Free SMS service after each card transaction.
• International usage is available after 2 months for credit cards following their date of issuance.
• Enjoy free access to numerous airport lounges by downloading the Mastercard Travel Pass app from the App Store or Google Play. Simply register using your Mastercard Platinum Credit card. To qualify, you will be required to make at least USD 1 (EGP equivalent) international transaction at point of sale (POS) or ecommerce to be eligible for your lounge benefit. Each eligible transaction will unlock 3 months of lounge access
• Get a 20% discount on Talabat delivery service every month by using the promocode MASTERCARD
• Purchasing using Contactless technology to make your shopping safe, fast and easy


--- Rewards Program ---

• Earn 3 points per each EGP spent locally and internationally.
• Enjoy 25,000 welcome points upon spending 2,500 EGP within 3 months from the issuing date.
• Earned points can be redeemed through various ways: Electronic Vouchers: Use your points to generate E-vouchers through BM online redeemable at participating merchant outlets. Instant Redemption: Instantly redeem your points at selected partner merchants without need for E-voucher issuance. Cashback: Convert your points into cash and transfer the value directly to your Banque Misr card.
• Electronic Vouchers: Use your points to generate E-vouchers through BM online redeemable at participating merchant outlets.
• Instant Redemption: Instantly redeem your points at selected partner merchants without need for E-voucher issuance.
• Cashback: Convert your points into cash and transfer the value directly to your Banque Misr card.
• For more information please visit: Banquemisr - BM Rewards Club
• To be able to manage your points please log into BM online or visit: www.bmrewardsclub.com . Terms and conditions applied.

Local cash withdrawals ( BM ATMs or Other Banks ATMs) | EGP 30000 Daily
P.O.S cash withdrawal from BM Branches | with Mix. limit EGP 250000 daily
International cash withdrawals (In case the customer has informed the bank of the travel) | 3000 EGP monthly


--- Credit Limit ---

• Enjoy credit limit starting from EGP 25000 up to less than EGP 100000

Printing certified transactions statement starting from the following month | EGP20

Upgraded credit cards fees | 50% of the issuance fees (first three years)


--- Purchases and Cash Withdrawals Installments ---

In case the customer wishes to pay-on installment for a processed transaction, then the following procedures shall be applied:

• Cash withdrawal transaction is carried out through credit card according to the card available balance
• During the performance of cash withdrawal transaction BM call center will be contacted in order to request the installment of transaction.
• Early repayment fees of 4% are applied in case the customer has paid the value of his installment.
• Cash withdrawal charges calculated on the customer’s credit card and related to the amount requested to be paid-on installment will be refunded.
